text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you met some amazing Umamusume!
But before we go off to start training...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to explain Support Card
scouting.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Let's switch over to the relevant Scout!
